name: Model Dress Up 3D
description: Welcome to Model Dress Up 3D Game, the perfect fashion styling game for girls and anyone who loves makeup, trendy outfits, and creative dress-up challenges! Step into the glamorous world of fashion where you can transform beautiful models into stylish superstars using hundreds of fashionable clothing items, accessories, hairstyles, and makeup combinations.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
